lines.speaker: Dwarven Engineer
lines.text: I wish you'd just leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Engineer
lines.text: I was a great engineer once. Still am actually.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Engineer
lines.text: They just don't let me do the work I do best anymore.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Engineer
lines.text: I'm an assistant in this shop. I get all the lousy jobs too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry to hear that.
